title: Tithymalus kozlovii
taxonomy: Tithymalus kozlovii is classified as a species within the plant family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the spurge family. This family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. The Euphorbiaceae family is further divided into several subfamilies and tribes, with Tithymalus kozlovii belonging to the subfamily Euphorbioideae. Within the subfamily Euphorbioideae, Tithymalus kozlovii is part of the tribe Euphorbieae. The genus Tithymalus is a group of succulent plants native to the subtropical and temperate regions of the world.
